headline: ADM Declares Cash Dividend
summary: CHICAGO, May 06, 2026--ADM’s (NYSE: ADM) Board of Directors has declared a cash dividend of 52.0 cents per share on the company’s common stock. The dividend is payable on June 10, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 20, 2026.

headline: ADM - declares cash dividend of $0.52 per share payable June 10, 2026
summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Co: ADM - declares cash dividend of $0.52 per share payable June 10, 2026...

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Underweight on Archer-Daniels-Midland, Raises Price Target to $74
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Thomas Palmer   maintains Archer-Daniels-Midland (NYSE:ADM) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $65 to $74.

headline: Stock Market News for May 6, 2026
summary: U.S. stocks ended higher on Tuesday, with the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq hitting new all-time highs, as oil prices slid and robust earnings from AI-related stocks lifted investors' sentiment.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Underweight on Archer-Daniels-Midland, Raises Price Target to $58
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Vincent Andrews   maintains Archer-Daniels-Midland (NYSE:ADM) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $54 to $58.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Archer-Daniels-Midland, Raises Price Target to $85
summary: Barclays  analyst Benjamin Theurer   maintains Archer-Daniels-Midland (NYSE:ADM) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $77 to $85.

headline: Archer Daniels Midland Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Archer Daniels Midland (NYSE:ADM) reported first-quarter 2026 adjusted earnings per share of $0.71 and total segment operating profit of $764 million, as management pointed to a more constructive margin environment in crushing and ethanol and raised its full-year outlook.
